title: Structure +
description:
"Structure +" This is a mod that adds 18 new structures! Some with useful loot and some not so much.
2 languages are available:
Russian and English
By Gloww
body: "Structure +" This is a mod that adds 18 new structures!The Wizard's House, the Tent of a traveling merchant, an Apiary, a treehouse in the jungle,a Hut in the Valley of Souls,A fallen oak, a Fallen birch,Ruins of the Snowy Tundra,the Tower of the Piglin Outpost, the Piglins Outpost,an Ice hole, a Distorted portal, a Crimson portal and much more!!
